description: THIRD PvP anchor (2026-05-18, X:117 Y:117 area, solo attack - NO rally, NO joiners). [SUP]Amanda (attacker) DECISIVE VICTORY over [SOL]Dark X Omar (garrison). NOT near-even: attacker won with 93,432 survivors of 272,772 (34.3%), defender FULLY WIPED. First DECISIVE-regime anchor, first SOLO anchor, first ASYMMETRIC-hero-kit anchor. Input scenario = Scenarios/Calibration_Amanda_Omar.json (front-end export, 1000 runs seed 4471).
specials_note: Both sides: +20% troops A/D/L/H items, -20% enemy A/D items, pets +10% A/D/L/H, enemy pet penalties -10% def/-5% leth/-5% hp. Defender widget: Defender Troops' Attack +15% (attacker has no attacker-side widget - solo attack). All baked into panel_pct (panel_is_final=true, widgets_in_panel=true).
skill_triggers_note: From the Skill Details panel (rows are icon-keyed; slot mapping partly uncertain): attacker Gisela x1/x19/x19/x59/x1, defender Gisela x1/x19/x18/x46. Flora (att lancer): x64/x1/x10/x5 + one row 6 triggers 4,759 kills. Karol (def lancer): 3 triggers 368 kills, x1. Ligeia (att marks): x19 w/ 7,328 kills, x19, x5, 6 triggers w/ 903 kills. Vulcanus (def marks): 16 triggers w/ 10,212 kills, x13, 7 triggers w/ 2,499 kills, x1. CLOCK: Gisela every-turn rows x19 both sides -> battle ~19-20 turns; defender Gisela x18 -> def infantry likely died end T18-19. Vulcanus 7-trigger row matches every-3-turns at ~19-20 turns (floor((19-1)/3)+1=7). OPEN PUZZLE: Vulcanus 16-trigger row exceeds the 'every 5 attacks per troop type' formula (~9-12 at this length) - cadence semantics still not fully solved; direct skill kills (both sides ~13k total) are small vs 217k casualties.
structural_ground_truth: GOLD per-class facts no rally anchor provides: (1) attacker LANCERS took ZERO casualties across ~19-20 turns -> the infantry wall NEVER fell (2,421 inf survived) -> strict front-to-back absorption held for the ENTIRE battle on the winning side. (2) attacker MARKSMAN lost 66.5% (45,375) while the wall stood -> ALL marksman damage arrived via BYPASS (defender Ambusher procs from 26,917 T11 lancers + any backline skills) -> bypass magnitude is large and sustained. (3) defender fully wiped in ~19-20 turns despite HIGHER panels (+3875 vs +3311 attack) -> count (+25.3%), tier (T12 vs T11 on lancer/marks), T12 stacks (3/1/2 vs 0/0/0), and composition geometry (25% T12 lancers ambushing a 45% marksman-heavy enemy; small 26.9k enemy lancer wall) DOMINATED the panel deficit.
prediction_failure_2026_07_07: BOTH engines invert this battle (verified, seed 4471): general aggregate engine p_win=2.6% (median attacker loss 100%, defender keeps ~38%); turn engine p_win=0.0 (attacker wiped in 13 turns, defender loses only 34.5%). Reality: attacker wins with 34.3% survivors, defender wiped, ~19-20 turns. DIAGNOSIS (layered): (L1-BUG) scouted-mode double-count - construct multiplies hero permanent stat skills (skillmult) on top of a scouted panel that ALREADY contains each side's own hero stat effects; with asymmetric kits this skewed attack to x0.800 (attacker, from Vulcanus SK1 -20% enemy attack) vs x1.150 (defender, Karol SK3 +15% own attack double-counted) = x0.70 relative handicap. Invisible in report_001/002 because both sides ran near-identical kits (Elif/Dominic/x) and the error cancelled. (L2-BUG-SUSPECT) enemy-debuff skills (Vulcanus SK1, Ligeia SK1) applied army-wide/permanent/all-rows without wiki verification of target-class/uptime (G10 audit applies). (L3-STRUCTURAL) strip test (all skillmult removed, panel-only stats): defender STILL wins 100% - the engine's stat physics alone gives the defender a 1.21x total-damage index edge, and Lanchester dynamics amplify any edge into a rout; the engine cannot see the attacker's real winning levers = sequencing/counter geometry (cheap late-game kills into 98k squishy T11 marksman after the small 26.9k lancer wall falls) + sustained Ambusher bypass + T12 stacks. This anchor is DECISIVE-regime: the engine is not merely imprecise here, it mis-RANKS the sides. Use as acceptance anchor for the turn-engine calibration alongside report_001/002.
